variants.text: How to Measure Social Media ROI: Define the outcome first (leads, sales assist, support deflection), assign attribution rules you can defend, and separate leading indicators from lagging revenue.

How to Measure Social Media ROI

Define the outcome first (leads, sales assist, support deflection), assign attribution rules you can defend, and separate leading indicators from lagging revenue. Avoid invented ROI percentages.

Read the guide:

How to Measure Social Media ROI

Define the outcome first (leads, sales assist, support deflection), assign attribution rules you can defend, and separate leading indicators from lagging revenue. Avoid invented ROI percentages.

Key takeaways:
• Outcome definition comes first
• Attribution is imperfect — be transparent
• Never fabricate ROI statistics
